signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% (Undershot Forecasts)** | NO | HIGH confidence[2]

South Korea's consumer price index rose 2.2% year-over-year in March 2026, up from 2.0% in February but below the median economist forecast of 2.4%[2]. This data, released April 2, 2026 by the Ministry of Data and Statistics, reflects government fuel price caps amid surging oil prices over
